name: core-etl

metadata.name: core-etl
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: This project/library contains common elements related to ETL processes...

documentation:
# core-etl
_______________________________________________________________________________

This project/library contains common elements related to ETL processes...

## Execution Environment

### Install libraries
```commandline
pip install --upgrade pip 
pip install virtualenv
```

### Create the Python Virtual Environment.
```commandline
virtualenv --python=python3.11 .venv
```

### Activate the Virtual Environment.
```commandline
source .venv/bin/activate
```

### Install required libraries.
```commandline
pip install .
```

### Check tests and coverage...
```commandline
python manager.py run-test
python manager.py run-coverage
```

documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

methods.name: core_etl.file_based.IBaseEtlFromFile._execute
documentation: Process each file from paths

methods.name: core_etl.file_based.IBaseEtlFromFile.get_paths
documentation:
It retrieves the file(s) from the source and return an iterator
with the paths for the files...

```
return

An iterator that contains the file paths.
```

methods.name: core_etl.file_based.IBaseEtlFromFile.process_file
documentation: Doing something with the file

methods.name: core_etl.file_based.IBaseEtlFromFile.on_success
documentation: Do something after the file is processed successfully, like archiving...

methods.name: core_etl.file_based.IBaseEtlFromFile.on_error
documentation: Do something after an error is raised while processing the file...

Base class for an ETL task that need to do something with a
file retrieved from a source. Like copy the file
from sFTP to S3...

modules.name: core_etl.record_based
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord.__init__
documentation:
---
param attrs_to_remove: Attributes to remove from the records.
param max_per_batch: Maximum number of elements to process per batch.
param name_mapper: It defines the old and new name for the attributes.
param type_mapper: It defines if a casting must be applied to an attribute.
---

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord._execute
documentation: Process (by applying transformations) each record from the source

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord.retrieve_records
documentation:
It retrieves records from sources. It's expected to return batches of records
because in this way we can manage the amount of records to process in each iteration
and do not exhaust the resources...

```
return

An iterator that contains a list of records.
```

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord.pre_transformations
documentation: Transformations applied before built-in ones...

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord.post_transformations
documentation: Transformations applied after built-in ones...

methods.name: core_etl.record_based.IBaseEtlFromRecord.process_records
documentation:
It must implement the actions to do with the records after
transformations like archive in S3, send to an sFTP server, send to
an SQS queue or a Kinesis stream...

Base class for an ETL task that need to do ETLs processes over data (records,
rows) retrieved from different sources like: file, sFTP server, SQS queues, APIs
or another data source...

Generic implementation for all the extract, transform

```
return

It returns the number of elements were processed.
```

methods.name: core_etl.base.IBaseETL.save_logs
documentation:
Save executions logs/metadata if required...

```
param execution_status

The status of the execution.

param processed_elements

The number of processed elements.

param error_type

The error type if exists.

param error_message

The error message if exists.

param error_traceback

The error traceback if exists.
```

methods.name: core_etl.base.IBaseETL.clean_resources
documentation: In case you need to close/remove some resources

Base class for an ETL task. A task defines the operations
over a service or a platform from where you need to
extract, transform and/or store information...

This class defines some commons (maybe useful) attributes/methods for future
implementations of the ETL tasks.
